metadata.name: 肉漫屋
metadata.description: 肉漫屋 - 成人漫画网站（繁体中文），需要科学上网
metadata.author: ManXia Team (移植自 keiyoushi)

network.userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 13; Pixel 7) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36

popular.description: 獲取熱門漫畫（首頁熱門區塊）

actions.code: (() => { const targetRegex = /正熱門|今日最佳|本週熱門/; const entries = []; const seen = new Set(); const sections = document.querySelectorAll('div.px-1 > div'); sections.forEach(section => { const header = section.querySelector(':scope > *:first-child'); if (!header || !targetRegex.test(header.textContent)) return; section.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/books/"]').forEach(el => { const href = el.getAttribute('href') || ''; const m = href.match(/\/books\/([^/\s?]+)/); if (!m) return; const slug = m[1]; if (seen.has(slug)) return; seen.add(slug); const titleEl = el.querySelector('div.truncate'); const title = titleEl ? titleEl.textContent.trim() : ''; const bgEl = el.querySelector('[style*="background-image"]'); let cover = ''; if (bgEl) { const s = bgEl.getAttribute('style') || ''; const cm = s.match(/url\(\'([^']+)\'\)|url\("([^"]+)"\)|url\(([^)]+)\)/); cover = cm ? (cm[1] || cm[2] || cm[3] || '') : ''; } if (title && slug) entries.push({ id: slug, url: '/books/' + slug, title, cover, author: '', genre: '' }); }); }); return JSON.stringify(entries); })();

filter.description: 篩選漫畫（狀態：全部/連載中/已完結）

actions.code: (() => { const entries = []; const seen = new Set(); document.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/books/"]').forEach(el => { const href = el.getAttribute('href') || ''; const m = href.match(/\/books\/([^\/\s?]+)/); if (!m) return; const slug = m[1]; if (seen.has(slug)) return; seen.add(slug); const titleEl = el.querySelector('div.truncate'); const title = titleEl ? titleEl.textContent.trim() : ''; if (!title) return; const bgEl = el.querySelector('[style*="background-image"]'); let cover = ''; if (bgEl) { const s = bgEl.getAttribute('style') || ''; const cm = s.match(/url\('([^']+)'\)|url\("([^"]+)"\)|url\(([^)]+)\)/); cover = cm ? (cm[1] || cm[2] || cm[3] || '') : ''; } entries.push({ id: slug, url: '/books/' + slug, title, cover, author: '', genre: '' }); }); return JSON.stringify(entries); })();
actions.description: 提取篩選結果漫畫列表

latest.description: 獲取最新更新（首頁最近更新區塊）

actions.code: (() => { const entries = []; const seen = new Set(); const sections = document.querySelectorAll('div.px-1 > div'); sections.forEach(section => { const header = section.querySelector(':scope > *:first-child'); if (!header || !header.textContent.includes('最近更新')) return; section.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/books/"]').forEach(el => { const href = el.getAttribute('href') || ''; const m = href.match(/\/books\/([^/\s?]+)/); if (!m) return; const slug = m[1]; if (seen.has(slug)) return; seen.add(slug); const titleEl = el.querySelector('div.truncate'); const title = titleEl ? titleEl.textContent.trim() : ''; const bgEl = el.querySelector('[style*="background-image"]'); let cover = ''; if (bgEl) { const s = bgEl.getAttribute('style') || ''; const cm = s.match(/url\(\'([^']+)\'\)|url\("([^"]+)"\)|url\(([^)]+)\)/); cover = cm ? (cm[1] || cm[2] || cm[3] || '') : ''; } if (title && slug) entries.push({ id: slug, url: '/books/' + slug, title, cover, author: '', genre: '' }); }); }); return JSON.stringify(entries); })();
actions.description: 提取最近更新區塊漫畫

actions.code: (() => { const page = ({{page}} || 1) - 1; const term = encodeURIComponent('{{query}}'); return '{{baseUrl}}/search?term=' + term + '&page=' + page; })();
actions.description: 構建搜尋URL（page 從 0 開始）

actions.code: (() => { const entries = []; const seen = new Set(); document.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/books/"]').forEach(el => { const href = el.getAttribute('href') || ''; const m = href.match(/\/books\/([^\/\s?]+)/); if (!m) return; const slug = m[1]; if (seen.has(slug)) return; seen.add(slug); const titleEl = el.querySelector('div.truncate'); const title = titleEl ? titleEl.textContent.trim() : ''; if (!title) return; const bgEl = el.querySelector('[style*="background-image"]'); let cover = ''; if (bgEl) { const s = bgEl.getAttribute('style') || ''; const cm = s.match(/url\('([^']+)'\)|url\("([^"]+)"\)|url\(([^)]+)\)/); cover = cm ? (cm[1] || cm[2] || cm[3] || '') : ''; } entries.push({ id: slug, url: '/books/' + slug, title, cover, author: '', genre: '' }); }); return JSON.stringify(entries); })();
actions.description: 提取搜尋結果漫畫列表

actions.code: (() => { const clean = (value) => String(value || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const stripSiteSuffix = (value) => { const suffix = ' - 肉漫屋'; const text = clean(value); return text.endsWith(suffix) ? clean(text.slice(0, text.length - suffix.length)) : text; }; const getMeta = (name) => { const node = document.querySelector('meta[property="' + name + '"]') || document.querySelector('meta[name="' + name + '"]'); return node ? clean(node.getAttribute('content') || '') : ''; }; const pathMatch = (location.pathname || '').match(/\/books\/([^\/\s?#]+)/); const slug = pathMatch ? pathMatch[1] : ''; const infoBox = document.querySelector('div.basis-3\\/5'); const rows = infoBox ? Array.from(infoBox.children).map((el) => clean(el.textContent)) : []; const rowValue = (labels) => { for (const label of labels) { const row = rows.find((item) => item.startsWith(label)); if (row) { return clean(row.slice(label.length)); } } return ''; }; const bodyTextRaw = String(document.body ? document.body.innerText : ''); const bodyText = clean(bodyTextRaw); const bodyValue = (label) => { const match = bodyTextRaw.match(new RegExp(label + '\\s*[:：]\\s*([^\\n]+)')); return match ? clean(match[1]) : ''; }; const sanitizeTagText = (value) => { let text = clean(value); const cutMarkers = ['簡介', '開始閱讀', '放入書架']; cutMarkers.forEach((marker) => { const index = text.indexOf(marker); if (index >= 0) text = clean(text.slice(0, index)); }); return text; }; const coverCandidates = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('img')).map((img) => ({ src: clean(img.getAttribute('src') || ''), alt: clean(img.getAttribute('alt') || '') })).filter((item) => item.src.length > 0 && !item.src.startsWith('/android-chrome-')); let title = rows.length > 0 ? rows[0] : ''; if (!title) title = stripSiteSuffix(getMeta('og:title')); if (!title) title = stripSiteSuffix(document.title); if (!title) { const coverImage = coverCandidates.find((item) => item.alt.toLowerCase().endsWith(' cover')); if (coverImage) title = clean(coverImage.alt.replace(/\s*cover$/i, '')); } if (!title) title = bodyValue('別名'); let cover = ''; const infoImage = document.querySelector('div.basis-2\\/5 img'); if (infoImage) cover = clean(infoImage.getAttribute('src') || ''); if (!cover) cover = getMeta('og:image'); if (!cover && coverCandidates.length > 0) { const candidate = coverCandidates.find((item) => /cover/i.test(item.alt)) || coverCandidates[0]; cover = candidate ? candidate.src : ''; } let description = ''; const introNode = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('p')).find((node) => clean(node.textContent).startsWith('簡介')); if (introNode) description = clean(introNode.textContent).replace(/^簡介[:：]/, '').trim(); if (!description) description = getMeta('og:description'); if (!description) { const descMatch = bodyText.match(/簡介\s*[:：]\s*([\s\S]*?)(?:\s+放入書架\s+開始閱讀|\s+放入書架|\s+開始閱讀|$)/); description = descMatch ? clean(descMatch[1]) : ''; } const author = rowValue(['作者:', '作者：']) || bodyValue('作者'); const statusText = rowValue(['狀態:', '狀態：']) || bodyValue('狀態'); const region = rowValue(['地區:', '地區：']) || bodyValue('地區'); const tagText = sanitizeTagText(rowValue(['標籤:', '標籤：']) || bodyValue('標籤')); const dateMatch = bodyText.match(/\b\d{1,2}\/\d{1,2}\/\d{4}\b/); const tags = []; if (region) tags.push(region); if (tagText) tags.push(...tagText.split(/[、,，]/).map((item) => clean(item)).filter((item) => item.length > 0 && !/^[0-9./\sKMkm]+$/.test(item))); const genre = Array.from(new Set(tags)).join(', '); return JSON.stringify({ id: slug, url: slug ? ('/books/' + slug) : '', title, cover, author, status: statusText.includes('完結') ? 'completed' : (statusText.includes('連載') ? 'ongoing' : 'unknown'), genre, description, updated: dateMatch ? dateMatch[0] : '' }); })();
actions.description: 提取漫畫詳情（標題/封面/作者/狀態/標籤/簡介/更新日期）

actions.code: (() => { const clean = (value) => String(value || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const pathMatch = (location.pathname || '').match(/\/books\/([^\/\s?#]+)/); const currentSlug = pathMatch ? pathMatch[1] : ''; const rows = Array.from(document.querySelector('div.basis-3\\/5')?.children || []).map((el) => clean(el.textContent)); const bodyText = clean(document.body ? document.body.innerText : ''); let updateTime = ''; for (let i = rows.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) { const match = rows[i].match(/\b(\d{1,2}\/\d{1,2}\/\d{4})\b/); if (match) { updateTime = match[1]; break; } } if (!updateTime) { const bodyMatch = bodyText.match(/\b(\d{1,2}\/\d{1,2}\/\d{4})\b/); updateTime = bodyMatch ? bodyMatch[1] : ''; } const chapterMap = new Map(); const putChapter = (slug, numberText, rawTitle) => { if (!slug || numberText === '') return; const key = slug + '/' + numberText; const number = Number(numberText); const fallbackTitle = Number.isNaN(number) ? ('第' + numberText + '話') : ('第' + String(number + 1) + '話'); const normalizedTitle = clean(rawTitle); const title = !normalizedTitle || normalizedTitle === '開始閱讀' ? fallbackTitle : normalizedTitle; const hasRealTitle = normalizedTitle.length > 0 && normalizedTitle !== '開始閱讀'; const existing = chapterMap.get(key); if (!existing || (existing.autoGenerated && hasRealTitle)) { chapterMap.set(key, { id: key, url: '/books/' + key, title, updateTime, autoGenerated: !hasRealTitle }); } }; document.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/books/"]').forEach((a) => { const href = clean(a.getAttribute('href') || ''); const match = href.match(/\/books\/([^\/\s?#]+)\/(\d+)(?:[?#].*)?$/); if (!match) return; putChapter(match[1], match[2], clean(a.textContent)); }); if (chapterMap.size === 0) { const html = document.documentElement ? document.documentElement.innerHTML : ''; const regex = /\/books\/([^\/\s\"'#?]+)\/(\d+)(?=[\"'#?<\s])/g; let match = regex.exec(html); while (match !== null) { putChapter(match[1], match[2], ''); match = regex.exec(html); } } if (chapterMap.size === 0 && currentSlug) putChapter(currentSlug, '0', ''); const chapters = Array.from(chapterMap.values()).sort((a, b) => Number(a.id.split('/').pop() || '0') - Number(b.id.split('/').pop() || '0')).map((item) => ({ id: item.id, url: item.url, title: item.title, updateTime: item.updateTime })); return JSON.stringify(chapters); })();
actions.description: 提取章節列表（去重開始閱讀入口，chapterId=slug/num）

getPageList.description: 获取章节图片列表（优先接管阅读页后提取 imageUrl）

actions.code: (() => { let chapter = '{{chapterId}}'; if (chapter.startsWith('http')) { try { chapter = new URL(chapter).pathname; } catch (e) {} } chapter = chapter.replace(/^\/+/, ''); if (chapter.startsWith('books/')) chapter = chapter.replace(/^books\//, ''); if (!chapter) { throw new Error('Roumanwu 页面缺少 chapterId'); } return '{{baseUrl}}/books/' + chapter; })();
actions.description: 规范化章节阅读页 URL
等待阅读页与客户端脚本稳定

actions.code: (() => { const seen = new Set(); const pages = []; const pushUrl = (raw) => { let url = String(raw || '').trim(); if (!url) return; url = url.replace(/\\u002F/g, '/').replace(/\\\//g, '/'); if (!/^https?:\/\//i.test(url)) return; if (!url.includes('rmcdn')) return; if (seen.has(url)) return; seen.add(url); pages.push({ index: pages.length, url }); }; const requestUrl = location.href; const xhr = new XMLHttpRequest(); xhr.open('GET', requestUrl, false); xhr.setRequestHeader('rsc', '1'); xhr.setRequestHeader('cache-control', 'no-store'); try { xhr.send(null); } catch (error) {} const text = String(xhr.responseText || ''); const regex = /\"imageUrl\":\"([^\"]+)\"/g; let match = regex.exec(text); while (match !== null) { pushUrl(match[1]); match = regex.exec(text); } if (pages.length === 0) { document.querySelectorAll('img').forEach((img) => { pushUrl(img.getAttribute('src') || ''); }); } return JSON.stringify(pages); })();
actions.description: 导航到同源章节页后，用同步 XHR 提取 RSC 图片列表

directSearch.description: 直達搜尋（輸入 slug 或 /books/ 連結）

actions.code: (() => { const q = ('{{query}}' || '').trim(); let slug = q; const m1 = q.match(/\/books\/([^\/\s?#]+)/); if (m1) slug = m1[1]; const m2 = q.match(/^books\/([^\/\s?#]+)/); if (m2) slug = m2[1]; try { if (/^https?:\/\//i.test(q)) { const u = new URL(q); const m3 = (u.pathname || '').match(/\/books\/([^\/\s?#]+)/); if (m3) slug = m3[1]; } } catch (e) {} const result = { type: 'detail', manga: { id: slug, title: '', url: '/books/' + slug, cover: '' }, error: null }; return JSON.stringify(result); })();
actions.description: 解析 slug 並返回 detail（後續由 getMangaDetail 處理）

actions.code: (() => { const page = ({{page}} || 1) - 1; const term = encodeURIComponent('{{tagId}}'); return '{{baseUrl}}/search?term=' + term + '&page=' + page; })();

actions.description: 導航到標籤搜尋結果頁

actions.code: (() => { const entries = []; const seen = new Set(); document.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/books/"]').forEach(el => { const href = el.getAttribute('href') || ''; const m = href.match(/\/books\/([^\/\s?]+)/); if (!m) return; const slug = m[1]; if (seen.has(slug)) return; seen.add(slug); const titleEl = el.querySelector('div.truncate'); const title = titleEl ? titleEl.textContent.trim() : ''; if (!title) return; const bgEl = el.querySelector('[style*="background-image"]'); let cover = ''; if (bgEl) { const s = bgEl.getAttribute('style') || ''; const cm = s.match(/url\('([^']+)'\)|url\("([^"]+)"\)|url\(([^)]+)\)/); cover = cm ? (cm[1] || cm[2] || cm[3] || '') : ''; } entries.push({ id: slug, url: '/books/' + slug, title, cover, author: '', genre: '' }); }); return JSON.stringify(entries); })();
actions.description: 提取標籤搜尋結果漫畫列表

changes: 修复 getPageList 与详情页后台推荐搜索共享 WebView 时互相抢占的问题
改为先导航到章节页，再通过同源同步 XHR 提取 RSC imageUrl，失败时回退 DOM 图片节点
修复详情页与章节页对裸 slug 的兼容
修复阅读页 getPageList，改为同步 XHR 提取 RSC 图片列表，避免异步脚本结果丢失
初始版本，從 Kotlin 移植至 ManXia JSON 格式
支持熱門、最新、搜尋、篩選（連載狀態）功能
支持漫畫詳情與章節列表（根據 /books/{slug}/{num} 解析）
支持圖片列表（RSC XHR + imageUrl 正規對比）
支持圖片解擾演算法（roumanwu / md5_last_byte_mod10_plus5）
